name: Bless
description: You bless up to three creatures within range. Whenever a target makes an attack roll or a saving throw before the spell ends, the target adds 1d4 to the attack roll or save. Engine: cast on self, this grants the caster +1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws via the buff layer; multi-target (allies) is descriptive.
scaling: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1.
